ns0:entry.ns0:title: CherryHQ/cherry-studio
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/CherryHQ/cherry-studio
Language: typescript
AI productivity studio with smart chat, autonomous agents, and 300+ assistants. Unified access to frontier LLMs

ns0:entry.ns0:title: EvolutionAPI/evolution-api
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/EvolutionAPI/evolution-api
Language: typescript
Evolution API is an open-source WhatsApp integration API

ns0:entry.ns0:title: KeygraphHQ/shannon
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/KeygraphHQ/shannon
Language: typescript
Shannon Lite is an autonomous, white-box AI pentester for web applications and APIs. It analyzes your source code, identifies attack vectors, and executes real exploits to prove vulnerabilities before they reach production.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: badlogic/pi-mono
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/badlogic/pi-mono
Language: typescript
AI agent toolkit: coding agent CLI, unified LLM API, TUI & web UI libraries, Slack bot, vLLM pods

ns0:entry.ns0:title: gitroomhq/postiz-app
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/gitroomhq/postiz-app
Language: typescript
📨 The ultimate agentic social media scheduling tool 🤖

ns0:entry.ns0:title: jamiepine/voicebox
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/jamiepine/voicebox
Language: typescript
The open-source AI voice studio. Clone, dictate, create.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: langfuse/langfuse
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/langfuse/langfuse
Language: typescript
🪢 Open source LLM engineering platform: LLM Observability, metrics, evals, prompt management, playground, datasets. Integrates with OpenTelemetry, Langchain, OpenAI SDK, LiteLLM, and more. 🍊YC W23

ns0:entry.ns0:title: mksglu/context-mode
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/mksglu/context-mode
Language: typescript
Context window optimization for AI coding agents. Sandboxes tool output, 98% reduction. 14 platforms

ns0:entry.ns0:title: mnfst/manifest
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/mnfst/manifest
Language: typescript
Smart Model Routing for Personal AI Agents. Cut Costs up to 70% 🦞👧🦚

ns0:entry.ns0:title: multica-ai/multica
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/multica-ai/multica
Language: typescript
The open-source managed agents platform. Turn coding agents into real teammates — assign tasks, track progress, compound skills.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: n8n-io/n8n
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/n8n-io/n8n
Language: typescript
Fair-code workflow automation platform with native AI capabilities. Combine visual building with custom code, self-host or cloud, 400+ integrations.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: open-metadata/OpenMetadata
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/open-metadata/OpenMetadata
Language: typescript
OpenMetadata is a unified metadata platform for data discovery, data observability, and data governance powered by a central metadata repository, in-depth column level lineage, and seamless team collaboration.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: siyuan-note/siyuan
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/siyuan-note/siyuan
Language: typescript
A privacy-first, self-hosted, fully open source personal knowledge management software, written in typescript and golang.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: thunderbird/thunderbolt
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/thunderbird/thunderbolt
Language: typescript
AI You Control: Choose your models. Own your data. Eliminate vendor lock-in.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: zilliztech/claude-context
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
